name: dev.fantasylab/yahoo
description: Yahoo Fantasy Sports MCP (NFL, NHL, NBA, MLB): leagues, standings, rosters, matchups, free agents/waivers, plus write ops (set-lineup, add/drop, trades). Runs via uvx. Requires a one-time Yahoo OAuth setup (`uvx --from mcp-yahoo-fantasy yahoo-login`) with YAHOO_CONSUMER_KEY and YAHOO_CONSUMER_SECRET from a Yahoo developer app.
